# Support

## Questions

For usage questions, configuration help, or general discussion, use GitHub Discussions:

https://github.com/AimAI-Labs/mihosh/discussions

## Bug Reports

Use the bug report issue template and include:

- Mihosh version
- Operating system and terminal
- Mihomo API address shape, without secrets
- Reproduction steps
- Expected and actual behavior

## Feature Requests

Use the feature request issue template. Describe the workflow you want to improve and why the current behavior is not enough.

## Security Issues

Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities. Follow the reporting guidance in `SECURITY.md`.
